title: Tangy Crumbly Syrian Sausage Soup
description: A refreshing, lowfat soup featuring sliced German bratwurst, fresh vegetables, and a tangy yogurtlemon sauce topped with crunchy crackers.
instructions: Heat a large pot over medium heat and add a splash of olive oil.
Sauté the diced onion and minced garlic until translucent and fragrant, about 3 minutes.
Add the diced carrot and celery and cook for another 4 minutes.
Insert the sliced bratwurst into the pot and brown on all sides for 5 minutes.
Pour in the chicken broth, bring to a gentle boil, then reduce heat and simmer for 10 minutes.
Stir in the ground cumin, salt, and pepper to taste.
Remove the pot from heat and whisk in the low‑fat yogurt and lemon juice until fully combined.
Return the pot to low heat and warm the soup for 2 minutes, ensuring the yogurt does not boil.
Season with fresh parsley, adjust salt if needed, and ladle the soup into bowls.
Sprinkle the crushed whole‑wheat crackers over each serving for a crunchy, crumbly contrast.
